name: aocyber
description: AO Cyber Systems plugins for Claude Code

plugins.name: devflow
plugins.description: Meta-prompting, context engineering, and spec-driven development system. 32 skills, 12 agents, wave-based parallelization, atomic commits, and persistent state across context resets.

plugins.name: social-media-generator
plugins.description: Generate social media images and videos using HTML/CSS templates with AI-generated imagery. Supports AOSentry Media, Replicate MCP, or CSS-only fallback.

plugins.name: aosentry-mcp
plugins.description: AI media and gateway management MCP servers. 45 tools: image generation, vision analysis, TTS, transcription, spend analytics, API key management, guardrails, models, users, teams, orgs, budgets, and config.
